name: Theo Brandt
description: A soft-spoken man with soil under his nails, tilting seed trays toward what little light gets over the parapet.
background: Ran the rooftop community garden above the coffee shop and never came down when the rest did.
personality: Gentle and stubbornly hopeful, the kind who narrates his day to the tomatoes.
secret: The last envelope of heirloom seed was his late husband's life's work, and giving any of it away feels like scattering him to strangers.
notes: T45 · Downtown. Skill: cultivation/food. Hook: the seed is a genuine future (a base garden, T52) tangled in grief — sharing it is a real cost to him, not mere hoarding.
